tasks.label: Rebuild Java Project
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (Test-Path bin) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force bin }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path bin | Out-Null; $sources = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File src -Filter *.java | ForEach-Object { ($_.FullName -replace '^.*?\\src\\','src/') -replace '\\','/' }; & javac -encoding UTF-8 -cp 'lib\mssql-jdbc-13.2.1.jre11.jar' -d bin $sources; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw "javac failed with exit code $LASTEXITCODE" }
